nasb.text: It is like leaven, which a woman took and hid in three pecks of flour until it was all leavened.”

esv.text: It is like leaven that a woman took and hid in three measures of flour, until it was all leavened.”

cnv.text: 它好像麵酵，女人拿去放在三斗麵裡，直到全團發起來。”

ccb.text: 上帝的国就像面酵，妇人拿来掺在三斗面里，使整团面都发起来。”

csbs.text: 它好比酵母，一个妇人拿去拌在三斗面里，直到整团面都发了酵。”
